skillSlots.name: Quick Kicks of the Blossom
skillSlots.description: Attack an enemy 3 times, dealing 80% ATK + 4% of the target's max HP as Physical Damage each time (capped at 1x the caster's ATK). This attack grants 30% Lifesteal Rate and counts as a Normal Attack.

skillSlots.name: Bloodstained Tornado
skillSlots.description: Attack randomly 4 times, dealing 60% ATK as Physical Damage each time (prioritizes attacking different enemies). Then attack all enemies, dealing 600% ATK as Physical Damage (damage is shared among all targets, with each target's damage capped at 2.5x the caster's ATK).

effects.name: Demonic Flames of Resentment
effects.description: When an ally's HP first drops below 40%, gain 1 stack of [Soul Embers]; when an ally dies for the first time, gain 2 stacks of [Soul Embers] (each target can trigger this effect only once).

effects.name: Demonic Flames of Resentment
effects.description: When [Soul Embers] reaches 10 stacks, immediately enter [Crimson Lotus] state.

effects.name: Demonic Flames of Resentment
effects.description: Entering [Crimson Lotus] state resets the cooldown of all skills.

effects.name: Demonic Flames of Resentment
effects.description: In [Crimson Lotus] state, all your attacks deal an additional 20% True Damage.

effects.name: Genesis I
effects.description:
When casting an Ultimate Skill in [Crimson Lotus] state, summon [Hundred Phantoms Scorched Earth], then deal 10% of each enemy's current HP as True Damage to all enemies (capped at 2x the caster's ATK).
[Hundred Phantoms Scorched Earth]: Reduces all enemies' True Damage Reduction by 20%; at the end of the turn, deals 5% of each enemy's current HP as True Damage to all enemies (capped at 1x the caster's ATK) and dispels 1 buff. Lasts 2 turns (this effect is non-stackable; re-obtaining it resets the duration).

effects.name: Genesis II
effects.description: When an ally dies for the first time, immediately enter [Crimson Lotus] state (this effect can trigger only once per battle).

effects.name: Genesis III
effects.description: In [Crimson Lotus] state, when an ally's HP drops below 60% after being hit, launch [Quick Kicks of the Blossom] at the attacker (each ally can trigger this at most once per turn).

effects.name: Genesis IV
effects.description: In [Crimson Lotus] state, gain Control Immunity; if an ally dies for the first time during this state, re-enter [Crimson Lotus] state.

effects.name: Genesis V
effects.description: When taking lethal damage in [Crimson Lotus] state, launch [Quick Kicks of the Blossom] at the attacker (this attack grants 100% Crit Rate and 30% Crit Damage); become immune to all damage until the counterattack ends. This effect triggers once per turn.
